particulars.description: For more details please refer to the instrument.

Kenninghall stores and post office, market place, kenninghall, norwich NR16 2AH (being part of the land described in the property register for title number NK183287 as bay house, market place, kenninghall, norwich NR16 2AH and as is more particularly described in a transfer of even date between (1) michael john humphreys and karen anne humphreys and (2) the mortgage - title number: NK183287 (part); land at bay house, market place, kenninghall NR16 2AH - title number: NK446844 and the dickleburgh stores, 1 rectory road, dickleburgh IP21 4NW - title number: NK358877.
